scripts.package:build: mkdir -p temp && protoc --plugin=node_modules/ts-proto/protoc-gen-ts_proto proto/layouts.proto -I proto --ts_proto_opt=unrecognizedEnum=false --ts_proto_opt=stringEnums=true --ts_proto_opt=useOptionals=all --ts_proto_opt=outputTypeAnnotations=false --ts_proto_opt=outputEncodeMethods=false --ts_proto_opt=outputClientImpl=false --ts_proto_opt=addGrpcMetadata=false --ts_proto_opt=outputJsonMethods=false --ts_proto_opt=outputPartialMethods=false --ts_proto_opt=snakeToCamel=false --ts_proto_opt=esModuleInterop=true --ts_proto_out=temp && rm -rf temp/google && tsc && rm -rf temp
scripts.package:publish: cp package.json dist && cd dist && npm publish --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org && cd ../ && rm -rf dist
